opening: I am writing to express my interest in the Senior Project Manager / Scrum Master position at Apply Digital. Leading multiple concurrent development teams through structured, iterative delivery — while maintaining alignment between business strategy and technical execution — is work I have done at scale for the past 8 years. I believe my background in Agile delivery, stakeholder management, and cross-functional facilitation maps directly to what your team needs.

sections.label: Multi-team Scrum Mastery with Delivery Impact
sections.body: At BBVA Peru, I served as Scrum Master for up to 7 simultaneous cross-functional digital squads across Legal Services, Retail Banking, and Corporate Banking — facilitating sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives for each team while adapting the approach to their maturity and flow characteristics. I maintained delivery roadmaps and release plans across 4 VPs (100+ teams), identifying dependencies and blockers proactively. The result was a 35% improvement in delivery predictability over 18 months. At Entel Peru, I scaled Scrum and Kanban practices across 28 teams in three business units, implementing Actionable Agile for percentile-based forecasting — achieving 20% cost reduction and 5% faster time-to-market.

sections.label: Beyond Ceremony Facilitation
sections.body: I have managed vendor contracting models, transforming fixed-price agreements into time-and-materials engagements with monthly controls across multiple external partners. I have built executive reporting dashboards connecting delivery metrics to business KPIs for Director and VP-level stakeholders. I have facilitated discovery sessions, strategic workshops, and quarterly business reviews for audiences of 80+ in-person and 450+ virtually. My technical background — 9 years in software engineering, CI/CD pipelines, and API integrations, more recently expanded into AI tools for delivery optimization — means I can engage confidently with engineering teams and contribute to technically informed decisions, not just coordinate around them.

sections.label: On the Transition from Banking to a Digital Agency Context
sections.body: My most relevant work happened inside large institutions, but the operating model was genuinely consultative: each of the 4 VPs I served at BBVA had distinct portfolios, cultures, and strategic objectives, and I operated as an internal consultant accountable to each one's outcomes. Navigating competing priorities across multiple stakeholders simultaneously, translating ambiguity into actionable delivery plans, and maintaining trust with senior leadership under pressure — that is precisely what your pod structure demands. I am currently consulting independently at LEAN OKR, which has sharpened that external-client accountability further.

sections.label: Why Apply Digital
sections.body: Your "One Team" approach and commitment to delivering measurable impact across complex, multi-brand ecosystems align with how I have always worked. I am excited about the opportunity to bring that discipline to global clients like Kraft Heinz, Lululemon, and Moderna — and to apply it across the diverse digital ecosystems that Apply Digital navigates. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience delivering Agile programs at scale can contribute to your team's work.
